kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Bridgegate and Millpond, one goes with Fletcher and the other with Potter.
Exactly one of these is true: Aldric goes with Fletcher; Wulfric goes with 15 coins; Blacksmith goes with 11 coins.
Between Cooper and Potter, one goes with Millpond and the other with Oldwall.
Aldric's levy is at least 6 coins away from the artisan in Eastcheap.
Millpond goes with exactly two of Matilda, Cooper, and 7 coins.
Exactly one of (the members of the Ironmongers' Guild, the artisan with 5 coins, and Beatrix) belongs to the Market Ward.
5 coins goes with exactly two of Rowan, Mason, and Southgate.
Aldric goes with 15 coins if and only if either Rowan does not go with Highrow or Weaver goes with Matilda (but not both).
Fletcher goes with exactly one of Matilda, Rowan, or 15 coins.
Exactly one of Wulfric, the Blacksmith, and the Cooper belongs to the Market Ward.
Either Millpond goes with 15 coins or someone in the Ironmongers' Guild goes with 15 coins (but not both).

hints.text: Suppose Blacksmith went with Bridgegate — following the clues from there hits a contradiction, so it doesn't.
chain: Start by assuming Blacksmith goes with Bridgegate.
Bridgegate goes with Blacksmith, so Fletcher can't go with Bridgegate.
Bridgegate goes with Blacksmith, so Potter can't go with Bridgegate.
…but now the clue “Between Bridgegate and Millpond, one goes with Fletcher and the other with Potter” can no longer hold — a contradiction.
So Blacksmith does not go with Bridgegate.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Between Cedarmere and Pinehollow, one goes with Carp and the other with Perch.
Exactly one of these is true: Boone goes with Carp; Wade goes with 13 lb; Bass goes with 9 lb.
Between Bluegill and Perch, one goes with Pinehollow and the other with Stillwater.
Boone's weight is at least 6 lb away from the angler at Foxglen.
Pinehollow goes with exactly two of Esther, Bluegill, and 5 lb.
Exactly one of (the members of the Catfish Family, the catch with 3 lb, and Cody) belongs to the West Watershed.
3 lb goes with exactly two of Mabel, Crappie, and Willowmere.
Boone goes with 13 lb if and only if either Mabel does not go with Mossbank or Trout goes with Esther (but not both).
Carp goes with exactly one of Esther, Mabel, or 13 lb.
Exactly one of Wade, the angler who landed the Bass, and the angler who landed the Bluegill belongs to the West Watershed.
Either Pinehollow goes with 13 lb or someone in the Catfish Family goes with 13 lb (but not both).

So Bass does not go with Cedarmere.
